_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: Colors! RGB LED
subtitle: Red, Green, Blue — Mix and Glow!
overview: Students learn how RGB LEDs create different colors using Red, Green and Blue light. Teacher changes colors while students identify and shout the color names. Students understand color mixing through fun real-life examples.

images._note: Add real classroom photos and RGB LED activity pictures.

gallery.caption: RGB LED can make many colors using Red, Green and Blue light

gallery._placeholder: ADD: RGB LED connected to Arduino
gallery.caption: RGB LED connected with Arduino
RGB lights used in decoration and gaming

keyTopics: RGB stands for Red, Green and Blue
RGB LED can create many colors
RGB LEDs are used in TVs, gaming keyboards and decorations
Arduino can control RGB LED colors

youtubeVideos.desc: Simple introduction to RGB LEDs and color mixing.

youtubeVideos.title: How RGB LEDs Work
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how RGB LEDs create multiple colors.

youtubeVideos.title: Arduino RGB LED Tutorial
youtubeVideos.desc: Connect RGB LED with Arduino and change colors.

activity.title: Guess the Color Game
steps: Teacher changes LED colors using code
Students shout the color name loudly
Mix two colors and ask students to guess
Challenge: Students create their favorite color

realLifeExamples: LED decorative strips use RGB LEDs
Television and mobile screens use RGB colors
Bluetooth speakers glow with RGB lights

quiz.explanation: RGB means Red, Green and Blue — the three main light colors.

quiz.q: What can an RGB LED do?
quiz.explanation: RGB LEDs mix colors to create many beautiful colors.

quiz.q: Which three colors are used in an RGB LED?
quiz.explanation: RGB LEDs use Red, Green and Blue light.

quiz.q: What color do Red and Green make together?
What color do Red and Blue make together?
What color is made when all RGB colors glow together?
quiz.explanation: All RGB colors together create White light.

quiz.q: Which device commonly uses RGB lights?
quiz.explanation: Gaming keyboards often use RGB lighting effects.

quiz.q: What did students do during the activity?
quiz.explanation: Students excitedly guessed and shouted the color names.

quiz.q: What controls the RGB LED in the activity?
quiz.explanation: Arduino changes the RGB LED colors using programming.

quiz.q: RGB LEDs are mostly used for:
quiz.explanation: RGB LEDs are used in decoration, displays and lighting systems.
